must_detect.matched_text: Proposed acquisition term sheet between Orion Maharlika Holdings, Inc. (acquirer) and Isla Verde Beverages, Inc. (Philippine issuer), internal ref OMH-ACQ-2026-001.

Structure: 70% share acquisition for PHP 1,800,000,000, funded by a bridge facility from Archipelago Commercial Bank, Inc. and issuance of new preferred shares to be admitted on the Luzon Securities Board (LSB).

Tax matters: acquirer bears documentary stamp tax on share transfers; withholding and VAT settlements will be handled by the issuer until closing, and no tax identification numbers will be exported offshore beyond statutory reporting.
Closing: targeted closing in Q3 2026 subject to LSB pre-admission, financing drawdown, customary representations and warranties, and absence of any material adverse change.

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: only required fields (name, contact, tax and bank details) will be collected
Proposed acquisition term sheet between Orion Maharlika Holdings, Inc. (acquirer) and Isla Verde Beverages, Inc. (Philippine issuer), internal ref OMH-ACQ-2026-001.

Structure: 70% share acquisition for PHP 1,800,000,000, funded by a bridge facility from Archipelago Commercial Bank, Inc. and issuance of new preferred shares to be admitted on the Luzon Securities Board (LSB).

Tax matters: acquirer bears documentary stamp tax on share transfers; withholding and VAT settlements will be handled by the issuer until closing, and no tax identification numbers will be exported offshore beyond statutory reporting.
Closing: targeted closing in Q3 2026 subject to LSB pre-admission, financing drawdown, customary representations and warranties, and absence of any material adverse change.
